services.name: E-commerce Tech Audit
services.description: A senior engineer reviews your Magento, Shopware or Shopify store top to bottom. Written report in 10 days.

services.name: Speed & Core Web Vitals Audit
services.description: Measures real-world performance, quantifies revenue lost to slow pages, with a prioritized fix plan.

services.name: Agency Estimate Review
services.description: A senior engineer checks whether your agency's estimate or invoice is fair and what's missing.

services.name: The Evacuation Plan
services.description: Independent code backup, restore-tested backups, and full access audit so you can leave your agency safely.

services.name: Migration Review
services.description: Independent 3-year financial and technical verdict on replatforming (open-source vs. SaaS). Custom quote.

services.name: Technical Due Diligence
services.description: Independent technical due diligence for e-commerce M&A and PE deals. Custom quote.

services.name: AI Readiness Audit
services.description: Assessment across 6 dimensions of AI readiness, prioritised findings, a scored report and a 60-min debrief.

pricing.desc: Runs your dev team: reviews, releases, standards
